name: dust-and-scratch-v2
description: Remove dust and scratches from old photos

grain.description: Apply film grain effect to the output
grain.title: Grain

grain_density.description: Density of the grain particles from 0 to 60
grain_density.title: Grain Density

grain_model.description: Type of grain to apply: silver rich (classic film look), gaussian (uniform noise), or grey (monochromatic grain)
grain_model.title: grain_model

grain_size.description: Size of the grain particles from 1 to 5
grain_size.title: Grain Size

grain_strength.description: Intensity of the grain effect from 0 to 60
grain_strength.title: Grain Strength

image.description: Image with dust, scratches, or surface imperfections to restore
image.title: Image
